name: Swedish Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage and slice the apple; grate the onion.
2. Heat honey in a heavy pot, add cabbage, stirring to coat the vegetables evenly. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (except peas) into the pot. Simmer again for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally until the mixture reduces significantly.
4. Add the green peas just before serving. The dish will reduce to about half its original size.
